Trump declares that the Iranian air force is "totally gone," says the U.S. military has "virtually destroyed Iran."

"Over the past 11 days, our military has virtually destroyed Iran... Their air force is gone. Totally gone," Trump said.

posts.text:
Trump stops his speech for a woman who has a health emergency.

A man can be seen shouting "medic!" 

"Do you have a doctor in the house, doctor?" 

"Take your time, please."
